/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libecl_formatters.so.1.2.1 -o libecl_formatters.so.1.2.1 CMakeFiles/ecl_formatters.dir/strings.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ri-one/ros2_ws/src/install/ecl_exceptions/lib:/home/ri-one/ros2_ws/src/install/ecl_errors/lib:/home/ri-one/ros2_ws/src/install/ecl_type_traits/lib: /home/ri-one/ros2_ws/src/install/ecl_exceptions/lib/libecl_exceptions.so.1.2.1 /home/ri-one/ros2_ws/src/install/ecl_errors/lib/libecl_errors.so.1.2.0 /home/ri-one/ros2_ws/src/install/ecl_type_traits/lib/libecl_type_traits.so.1.2.1
